title: Resolution Expressing Sincerest Appreciation and Deepest Gratitude to the Manila Electric Company (MERALCO) for Their Response and Action Made in Relation to the Improvement of Meralco Services and Facilities Particularly in Barangay Mayondon. (AUTHORS : COUNCILOR (S) Janos S. Lapiz, Geronimo A. Ciceron, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Mike Dexter A. Concio, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Cris Dayril B. Bagnes, Rodora P. Loares, Jozylyn N. Manansala, 11/15/21)
